mapper.select: SELECT tpi.grp_idx, tpi.grp_nm, tpi.pump_idx, m.motor_id as motor_id, CASE WHEN m.unbalance_alarm = 1 OR m.misalignment_alarm = 1 OR m.rotor_alarm = 1 OR m.de_bpfo_alarm = 1 OR m.DE_BPFI_alarm = 1 OR m.DE_BSF_alarm = 1 OR m.DE_FTF_alarm = 1 OR m.NDE_BPFO_alarm = 1 OR m.NDE_BPFI_alarm = 1 OR m.NDE_BSF_alarm = 1 OR m.NDE_FTF_alarm = 1 OR m.DE_RMS_ALARM = 1 OR m.NDE_RMS_ALARM = 1 OR p.impeller_alarm = 1 OR p.cavitation_alarm = 1 OR p.de_bpfo_alarm = 1 OR p.DE_BPFI_alarm = 1 OR p.DE_BSF_alarm = 1 OR p.DE_FTF_alarm = 1 OR p.NDE_BPFO_alarm = 1 OR p.NDE_BPFI_alarm = 1 OR p.NDE_BSF_alarm = 1 OR p.NDE_FTF_alarm = 1 THEN 'True' ELSE 'False' END AS Alarm, m.unbalance_alarm as 'm_unbalance_alarm', m.misalignment_alarm as 'm_misalignment_alarm', m.rotor_alarm as 'm_rotor_alarm', m.de_bpfo_alarm as 'm_de_bpfo_alarm', m.DE_BPFI_alarm as 'm_de_bpfi_alarm', m.DE_BSF_alarm as 'm_de_bsf_alarm', m.DE_FTF_alarm as 'm_de_ftf_alarm', m.NDE_BPFO_alarm as 'm_nde_BPFO_alarm', m.NDE_BPFI_alarm as 'm_nde_bpfi_alarm', m.NDE_BSF_alarm as 'm_nde_bsfbsf_alarm', m.NDE_FTF_alarm as 'm_nde_ftf_alarm', m.DE_RMS_ALARM as 'm_de_rms_alarm', m.NDE_RMS_ALARM as 'm_nde_rms_alarm', p.impeller_alarm as 'p_impeller_alarm', p.cavitation_alarm as 'p_cavitation_alarm', p.de_bpfo_alarm as 'p_de_bpfo_alarm', p.DE_BPFI_alarm as 'p_de_bpfi_alarm', p.DE_BSF_alarm as 'p_de_bsf_alarm', p.DE_FTF_alarm as 'p_de_ftf_alarm', p.NDE_BPFO_alarm as 'p_nde_BPFO_alarm', p.NDE_BPFI_alarm as 'p_nde_bpfi_alarm', p.NDE_BSF_alarm as 'p_nde_bsf_alarm', p.NDE_FTF_alarm as 'p_nde_ftf_alarm', p.DE_RMS_ALARM as 'p_de_rms_alarm', p.NDE_RMS_ALARM as 'p_m_nde_rms_alarm', CASE WHEN m.de_bpfo_alarm = 1 OR m.DE_BPFI_alarm = 1 OR m.DE_BSF_alarm = 1 OR m.DE_FTF_alarm = 1 THEN 'True' ELSE 'False' END as 'm_de_bp_alarm', CASE WHEN m.NDE_BPFO_alarm = 1 OR m.NDE_BPFI_alarm = 1 OR m.NDE_BSF_alarm = 1 OR m.NDE_FTF_alarm = 1 THEN 'True' ELSE 'False' END as 'm_nde_bp_alarm', CASE WHEN p.de_bpfo_alarm = 1 OR p.DE_BPFI_alarm = 1 OR p.DE_BSF_alarm = 1 OR p.DE_FTF_alarm = 1 THEN 'True' ELSE 'False' END as 'p_de_bp_alarm', CASE WHEN p.NDE_BPFO_alarm = 1 OR p.NDE_BPFI_alarm = 1 OR p.NDE_BSF_alarm = 1 OR p.NDE_FTF_alarm = 1 THEN 'True' ELSE 'False' END as 'p_nde_bp_alarm' FROM TB_AI_DIAG_MOTOR as m LEFT JOIN TB_AI_DIAG_PUMP as p ON m.motor_id = p.PUMP_ID AND m.ACQ_DATE = p.ACQ_DATE JOIN TB_PUMP_INF as tpi ON tpi.motor_id = p.PUMP_ID AND tpi.motor_id = m.motor_id WHERE m.ACQ_DATE = ( SELECT ACQ_DATE FROM TB_AI_DIAG_MOTOR WHERE ACQ_DATE <= #{endDate} AND ACQ_DATE >= #{startDate} AND MOTOR_ID = #{id} GROUP BY ACQ_DATE ORDER BY ACQ_DATE DESC LIMIT 0, 1 ) ORDER BY m.ACQ_DATE DESC, pump_idx;

select p.grp_idx, p.grp_nm, p.pump_idx, p.motor_id, mp.ACQ_DATE, ( mp.M_DE_BEARING_TEMP_FAULT = 1 or mp.M_NDE_BEARING_TEMP_FAULT = 1 or mp.P_DE_BEARING_TEMP_FAULT = 1 or mp.P_DE_BEARING_TEMP_FAULT = 1 or mp.P_DE_BEARING_TEMP_FAULT = 1 or mp.P_DE_BEARING_TEMP_FAULT = 1 ) as Alarm, mp.M_DE_BEARING_TEMP_FAULT as 'm_de_bearing_temp_alarm', mp.M_NDE_BEARING_TEMP_FAULT as 'm_nde_bearing_temp_alarm', mp.P_DE_BEARING_TEMP_FAULT as 'p_de_bearing_temp_alarm', mp.P_NDE_BEARING_TEMP_FAULT as 'p_de_bearing_temp_alarm', pw.WINDING_TEMPR_FAULT as 'winding_temp_r_alarm', pw.WINDING_TEMPS_FAULT as 'winding_temp_s_alarm', pw.WINDING_TEMPT_FAULT as 'winding_temp_t_alarm'
from TB_DIAG_MOTOR_PUMP as mp, TB_DIAG_MOTOR_PUMP_WINDING as pw, TB_PUMP_INF as p where mp.PUMP_SCADA_ID = pw.PUMP_SCADA_ID and mp.CENTER_ID = pw.CENTER_ID and mp.ACQ_DATE = pw.ACQ_DATE and p.PUMP_SCADA_ID = mp.PUMP_SCADA_ID and p.PUMP_SCADA_ID = pw.PUMP_SCADA_ID and mp.ACQ_DATE = ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(ACQ_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:00') as 'ACQ_DATE' FROM TB_AI_DIAG_MOTOR WHERE ACQ_DATE <= NOW() and ACQ_DATE >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 MINUTE) and MOTOR_ID in (SELECT MOTOR_ID FROM TB_PUMP_INF WHERE GRP_IDX= #{grp_idx}) GROUP BY ACQ_DATE ORDER BY ACQ_DATE DESC LIMIT 0, 1) and p.grp_idx = #{grp_idx} ORDER BY mp.ACQ_DATE DESC, p.pump_idx;

SELECT tpi.grp_idx, tpi.grp_nm, tpi.pump_idx, tps.pump_scada_id, tps.eq_on FROM TB_PUMP_SCADA as tps JOIN TB_PUMP_INF as tpi ON tpi.pump_scada_id = tps.pump_scada_id WHERE ACQ_DATE = ( SELECT ACQ_DATE FROM TB_PUMP_SCADA GROUP BY ACQ_DATE ORDER BY ACQ_DATE DESC LIMIT 1 , 1) AND tpi.grp_idx = #{grp_idx} order by pump_scada_id

SELECT pump_scada_id , ACQ_DATE as acq_date , flow_rate / 60 as flow_rate , pressure * 10 as pressure FROM TB_PUMP_SCADA WHERE ACQ_DATE >= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00') and ACQ_DATE <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59') and pump_scada_id = #{id}

SELECT tpi.GRP_IDX as grp_idx, tpi.GRP_NM as grp_nm, tpi.PUMP_IDX as pump_idx, m.MOTOR_ID as motor_id, DATE_FORMAT(m.ACQ_DATE , '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as acq_date, m.DE_rms_amp as motor_de_rms_amp, m.NDE_rms_amp as motor_nde_rms_amp, p.DE_rms_amp as pump_de_rms_amp, p.NDE_rms_amp as pump_nde_rms_amp FROM TB_AI_DIAG_MOTOR as m LEFT JOIN TB_AI_DIAG_PUMP as p on m.MOTOR_ID = p.PUMP_ID and m.ACQ_DATE = p.ACQ_DATE JOIN TB_PUMP_INF as tpi ON tpi.MOTOR_ID = m.MOTOR_ID and tpi.MOTOR_ID = p.PUMP_ID WHERE m.ACQ_DATE >= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00') and m.ACQ_DATE <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59') and tpi.GRP_IDX = #{id} ORDER BY m.ACQ_DATE ASC

SELECT flow_rate , pressure FROM TB_PUMP_SCADA WHERE ACQ_DATE = ( SELECT ACQ_DATE FROM TB_PUMP_SCADA WHERE ACQ_DATE >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 MINUTE) GROUP BY ACQ_DATE ORDER BY ACQ_DATE DESC LIMIT 1 , 1) AND pump_scada_id = #{id}

SELECT m.motor_id as moter_id , m.DE_rms_amp as motor_de_rms_amp , m.NDE_rms_amp as motor_nde_rms_amp , m.misalignment_amp as motor_misalignment_amp , m.unbalance_amp as motor_unbalance_amp , m.rotor_amp as motor_rotor_amp , m.de_amp as motor_de_amp , m.NDE_amp as motor_nde_amp , p.DE_amp as pump_de_amp , p.NDE_amp as pump_nde_amp , p.cavitation_amp as pump_cavatation_amp , p.impeller_amp as pump_impeller_amp , p.DE_rms_amp as pump_de_rms_amp , p.NDE_rms_amp as pump_nde_rms_amp , DATE_FORMAT(m.ACQ_DATE , '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as acq_date FROM TB_AI_DIAG_MOTOR as m LEFT JOIN TB_AI_DIAG_PUMP as p on m.motor_id = p.PUMP_ID and m.ACQ_DATE = p.ACQ_DATE WHERE m.ACQ_DATE >= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00') and m.acq_date <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59') and m.motor_id = #{id} ORDER BY m.ACQ_DATE ASC

WITH RankedData AS ( SELECT pump_scada_id, ACQ_DATE, M_DE_bearing_temp, M_NDE_bearing_temp, P_DE_bearing_temp, P_NDE_bearing_temp, DATE_FORMAT(ACQ_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00') as acq_hour, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY pump_scada_id, DATE_FORMAT(ACQ_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00') ORDER BY ACQ_DATE) as rn FROM TB_DIAG_MOTOR_PUMP as m WHERE m.ACQ_DATE >= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00') AND m.ACQ_DATE <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59') AND m.pump_scada_id = #{id} ) SELECT pump_scada_id, DATE_FORMAT(ACQ_DATE , '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as acq_date, M_DE_bearing_temp, M_NDE_bearing_temp, P_DE_bearing_temp, P_NDE_bearing_temp, acq_hour FROM RankedData WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY acq_date ASC;

select PUMP_SCADA_ID as 'pump_scada_id', DATE_FORMAT(MAX(ACQ_DATE) , '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as acq_date, BRG_MOTOR_DE_TEMP as 'M_DE_bearing_temp', BRG_MOTOR_NDE_TEMP as 'M_NDE_bearing_temp', BRG_PUMP_DE_TEMP as 'P_DE_bearing_temp', BRG_PUMP_NDE_TEMP as 'P_NDE_bearing_temp' from TB_PUMP_SCADA WHERE DATE_FORMAT(ACQ_DATE, '%i') in ('00' , '30') and ACQ_DATE >= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00') and ACQ_DATE <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59') and pump_scada_id = #{id} GROUP BY ACQ_DATE order by ACQ_DATE asc

WITH RankedData AS ( SELECT pump_scada_id, ACQ_DATE, winding_tempR, winding_tempS, winding_tempT, DATE_FORMAT(ACQ_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00') as acq_hour, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY pump_scada_id, DATE_FORMAT(ACQ_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00') ORDER BY ACQ_DATE) as rn FROM TB_DIAG_MOTOR_PUMP_WINDING as m WHERE m.ACQ_DATE >= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00') AND m.ACQ_DATE <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59') AND m.pump_scada_id = #{id} ) SELECT pump_scada_id, DATE_FORMAT(ACQ_DATE , '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as acq_date, winding_tempR, winding_tempS, winding_tempT, acq_hour FROM RankedData WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY acq_date ASC;

select PUMP_SCADA_ID as 'pump_scada_id', DATE_FORMAT(MAX(ACQ_DATE) , '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as acq_date, R_TEMP as 'winding_tempR', S_TEMP as 'winding_tempS', T_TEMP as 'winding_tempT' from TB_PUMP_SCADA WHERE DATE_FORMAT(ACQ_DATE, '%i') in ('00' , '30') and ACQ_DATE >= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00') and ACQ_DATE <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59') and pump_scada_id = #{id} GROUP BY ACQ_DATE order by ACQ_DATE asc
SELECT json_data FROM TB_JSON where pump_scada_id = #{pump_scada_id} order by ACQ_DATE desc limit 1

SELECT dstrb_idx, pump_idx, dstrb_name, dstrb_order_number, dstrb_value, reg_date FROM TB_DSTRB WHERE PUMP_IDX = #{pump_idx} AND reg_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 WEEK) ORDER BY dstrb_name, dstrb_order_number
SELECT EQ_TYPE as 'eq_type', GRAPH_TYPE as 'graph_type', TH_VALUE as 'th_value' FROM TB_GRAPH_THRESHOLD
